placements.overview:
A student can pursue these 57 courses as Degree. Asra Group of Institutions offers UG, PG and After 10th courses. Institute enjoys a good reputation for courses like B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, B.Ed, M.A., UG Diploma, MBA/PGDM, MCA, M.Com, M.Sc., PGDCA, BCA, BBA, B.Com, B.A., B.Sc(Hons.), After 10th Diploma, B.Sc., M.Lib.Sc., B.Lib.Sc., Certificate in the streams of Engineering, Teaching & Education, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Humanities & Social Sciences, Science, Medicine & Health Sciences Students can opt courses from these. Over the period, Asra Group of Institutions has gained expertize through its trained and experienced faculty in the fields of Mechanical Engineering. Asra Group of Institutions offered courses that are recognized by approving bodies like AICTE. Asra Group of Institutions offer courses for a total of 1966 candidates. Institute have courses for all 1966 students. For students institute have extraordinary facilities & infrastructure like Auditorium, Boys Hostel, Cafeteria, Co-ed Hostel, Girls Hostel, Gym, Hospital / Medical Facilities, Hostel, Labs, Library, Sports Complex, Wi-Fi Campus.

Asra Group of Institutions is a private institute, established in 2009 in Tehsil Bhawanigarh, Punjab. Asra Group of Institutions is approved by AICTE and offers a total of 57 courses at UG, PG and Certificate levels in 15 specialisations such as Agriculture, Anaesthesia, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering and Digital Marketing. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and M.Sc. in Full Time mode. Asra Group of Institutions has an annual seat intake of 1966 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce and Humanities & Social Sciences. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and academic facilities.

review_content.Placements: Percentage should be at least 50% for admission. The college provides no placement after the graduation of completing any course. The college is only responsible for the students' academic percentage while pursuing the degree or course they are engaged in.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is quite good. The classrooms are comfortable and well-designed from the perspective of infrastructure. The ambience of the college is also quite impressive. Required labs and libraries are available in every department.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied with the infrastructure, but staff members are good.

review_content.Placements: The college basically focuses on just providing degrees. So don't expect any type of placement from here. They don't have any relationships with any recruiting companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average and doesn't have basic amenities. Buildings for different departments are there, but the college suffers from admissions. So they lack providing good labs, libraries, mess, and canteen. The hostel of the college has no students, so there is no mess. The college also doesn't indulge students in any type of sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a good infrastructure, and it is good for day scholars.

review_content.Placements: Placements are very rare at our college, especially in our course. Only 1-2% of the students got placed on their own by applying to different companies. There was no top recruiting company. Around 30% of the students got internships from our course in web designing and other courses.
review_content.Infrastructure: Campus is highly demarcated with labs, a Wi-Fi system, and good infrastructure. For the day scholars, a bus facility is available. The sports ground was very good having synthetic mats. On-campus, there is a canteen providing hygienic food. The hostel building is very nice and had facilities like air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned rooms.

cut_off.college_name: PKG College of Engineering and Technology Cutoff 2025: Check HSTES Previous Years Ranks

description: PKG College of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to the BTech program. The cutoffs are available in the form of ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates interested in taking admission at PKG College of Engineering and Technology can check out the sections below to view the exam, course, and category-wise cutoff details. A few more updates are below:

The PKG College of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the PKG College of Engineering and Technology BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing rank was 877449 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering.

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 877449 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 261766 in 2022.

PKG College of Engineering and Technology accepts JEE Main scores for admission to the BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table below to view the important JEE Main 2025 dates to be eligible for BTech admission at PKG College of Engineering and Technology.

PKG College of Engineering and Technology JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for PKG College of Engineering and Technology.

Candidates can find the closing ranks for the PKG College of Engineering and Technology released based on HSTES in the table below. The closing rank for the General AI category candidates was closed at 877449.

The most stringent cutoff was for admission to B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, with the last round closing rank of 877449 for the General AI quota. In 2022, the cutoff rank for the same was 261766.

Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.

highlights.summary: The TNEA 2026 counselling application window is expected to launch in the first week of May 2026 for Shree Sathyam College Of Engineering And Technology admission to BE/BTech courses.

faqs.answer:
A:    Shree Sathyam College Of Engineering And Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.

review_content.Placements: My college offers the best placements for the students according to their abilities and percentage. It offered the placements in Infosys, Bharati Limited, and Java. reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and facilities

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: It has good infrastructure and facilities but is not good in teaching techniques and placements.

review_content.Placements: Only 20% of students got paced, but they are not working in those companies now. The average salary package offered ranges from 1.2 LPA - 1.5 LPA. Only BPO and IT companies come to our college for recruitment. Only students with 6 CGPA can get internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is not bad. Drinking water, classrooms and bathrooms are good. They said that the entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled, but it is not working. Libraries were good with the books needed. Laboratories also had what we needed.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Placements in 2015-2020 are good.

review_content.Placements: In our course, until now, 70% of students got placed. The highest salary offered is Rs. 25,000 per month for freshers, the lowest offered is Rs. 8,000 per month and the average offered is Rs. 12,000 per month. The top recruiting company of our college is Asahi Glass Private Limited. The top role offered to the students is a designing engineer. In our course, the highest salary package offered is 25 LPA, the lowest salary package offered is 1 LPA and the average salary package offered is 1.5 LPA. About 10-15% of the students got an internship in VDart Technologies.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Vidya College of Engineering & Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: The highest salary package was offered for PG and MBA courses. The lowest salary package was offered for UG and CSE courses. The top recruiting companies were Nileas and Wind. Almost 60% of students got internships in this course. The top roles were offered in this course.
content.Infrastructure: There were 3 to 4 laboratories in the CSE department. Personal computers were available to run a program like android studio, etc. It provided a decent library. The food served in the hostel was good. The canteen was also good. Medical facilities were average. Sports and games were conducted.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: A little bit satisfied because of the college environment, it is good.

content.Placements: We did not offer any placements in our college for civil graduates. They provided placements for CSE ECE and EEE batches and even the MECH department got placement in some companies. We got nothing from placement but they conducted some placement training programs.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good sports activities because I am the captain of our college volleyball and cricket team. They have a good kit bag and other sports equipment.
content.Faculty: Teachers are good and have good exam practices. Good professors are very kind and polite to students and there are some experienced faculty members in our department and many other good faculty members in other departments. You can choose any department except Civil from our college it will be worth it.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure and facilities but is not good in teaching techniques and placements.

content.Placements: Only 20% of students got paced, but they are not working in those companies now. The average salary package offered ranges from 1.2 LPA - 1.5 LPA. Only BPO and IT companies come to our college for recruitment. Only students with 6 CGPA can get internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is not bad. Drinking water, classrooms and bathrooms are good. They said that the entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled, but it is not working. Libraries were good with the books needed. Laboratories also had what we needed.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Placements in 2015-2020 are good.

content.Placements: In our course, until now, 70% of students got placed. The highest salary offered is Rs. 25,000 per month for freshers, the lowest offered is Rs. 8,000 per month and the average offered is Rs. 12,000 per month. The top recruiting company of our college is Asahi Glass Private Limited. The top role offered to the students is a designing engineer. In our course, the highest salary package offered is 25 LPA, the lowest salary package offered is 1 LPA and the average salary package offered is 1.5 LPA. About 10-15% of the students got an internship in VDart Technologies.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The quality of teaching is improved compared to 2018. The infrastructure is good.

content.Placements: Almost 60 to 70% of the students got placed. The highest salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month, the lowest salary offered is Rs. 8,000 per month, the average salary offered is Rs. 12,000 per month. Top companies visit our campus for placements. Roles like designing field, manager and other core related jobs are offered to students.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are good. The college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, etc. All facilities are available in the hostel. The quality of the food served in the mess and canteen is average. The medical facilities are good. Sports and games are good.

admission_process.title: Sri Vidya College of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sri Vidya College of Engineering and Technology admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingEngineering and Business and Management Studies.Sri Vidya College of Engineering and Technologyadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asGATE, CEETA, and TANCET. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 35,000 - 2,00,000for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 4 years.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: There were 3 to 4 laboratories in the CSE department. Personal computers were available to run a program like android studio, etc. It provided a decent library. The food served in the hostel was good. The canteen was also good. Medical facilities were average. Sports and games were conducted.

reviews.review_text: The college has good sports activities because I am the captain of our college volleyball and cricket team. They have a good kit bag and other sports equipment.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and facilities but is not good in teaching techniques and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is not bad. Drinking water, classrooms and bathrooms are good. They said that the entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled, but it is not working. Libraries were good with the books needed. Laboratories also had what we needed.

reviews.review_heading: Placements in 2015-2020 are good.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides Wi-Fi, various labs, classrooms, library, various project models, seminar halls for each department, placement cell and office. Food served in the hostel is hygienic, and rooms will be normal but not extraordinary. Sports are also available here, and canteen food's price will be affordable. MBA courses are also available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: The quality of teaching is improved compared to 2018. The infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are good. The college provides facilities like  Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, etc. All facilities are available in the hostel. The quality of the food served in the mess and canteen is average. The medical facilities are good. Sports and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: In this will develop the slow learner also.
reviews.review_text:
The classroom of the college is looking good, and all facilities are arranged in it. The college has Wi-Fi, but that is no use for students. They have an average lab facility, and the hostel also average in my college. There is also a canteen in my college
and the sports student will be given priority.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of HOD in 2017.
reviews.review_text:
They told us that there is Wi-Fi in our college, but we haven't used it during the four years in the college. We asked our faculty members for it but they said that Wi-Fi is only for faculty members.
Labs have facilities as much as needed.
Our classroom ceiling has cracked. In rainy seasons, the rainwater enters via the ceiling.
I haven't seen any medical facilities. There will be a sports day every year, but it is just an eyewash for advertisements. Foods in our canteen are not hygienic and all...

reviews.review_heading: The quality of teaching is good, and the placements are good compared to 2018.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities and infrastructures are available in our college, like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and library. All the facilities are available in the hostel. Good quality food is available in the mess and canteen. Good medical facilities are available. Sports and games facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Vidya College of Engineering & Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the worst. It smells bad on the campus. School and college buildings are built in a small place. No proper lab facilities are available, and the equipment in labs is only for showcase and not for use. Roads are okay and spacious. The parking place is the worst and not safe as robbery can happen easily.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, sports and games are available in the college. The quality of labs and classrooms is good. All the types of food is available with excellent taste. Rooms are spacious. I did not face any issue here.

reviews.review_heading: The worst college. Do no join this college.
reviews.review_text:
There is only one building for 4 departments. 
Buildings are not in good condition. Ther is no Wi-Fi on the campus. There is no lab equipment. All operating system and software installed are cracked versions. Most of the times they do not work.

highlights.summary: Established in 2011, Aryans College of Engineering is a private institute in Rajpura, Punjab. The institute is approved by the AICTE. At the UG and After 10th levels, the institute offers 10 courses across 5 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular Aryans College of Engineering programs include B.E. / B.Tech and After 10th Diploma. Aryans College of Engineering courses are provided in several streams including Engineering, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 420 students. The fees at Aryans College of Engineering ranges between INR 1,68,000 to 2,40,000 for the different courses. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.

overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Choose the best, give your best, and achieve success.

content.Placements: There are very good placement opportunities, with many students getting placed in top companies that showcase good skills and talent. Companies such as Flipkart, Microsoft, Amazon, Accenture, Tata, Tesla, IBM, Tech Mahindra, and Wipro visit our campus. 40 percent of students got internships with paid jobs. The highest package offered for my department is 13 LPA, with the lowest average being 1.8 LPA and 4.8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our infrastructure is beautiful, with greenery, clean floors, well-manufactured classrooms, digital boards, and projectors. Facilities include classrooms, libraries, canteens, labs, playgrounds, mess, and transport. Hostel food offers a variety of items and snacks. Sports and game facilities are also available.

individual_reviews.title: It is the best engineering college in North India.

content.Placements: Our college provided good placements and internships to students. The salary package offered ranges between 3 LPA - 14 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hostel was good. Our college provided facilities like a mess facility, a canteen, Wi-Fi, medical facilities, sports, a gym, and games. Students can play games in the hostel. Laboratories were available for all courses. The hostel was good and well-furnished. Around 2-5 students can share each hostel room.

NPU Jharkhand courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at NPU in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:    NPU Jharkhand offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The university is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Science, Humanities, Commerce, Education, Medicine, Law, Social Science, and Dental education. Nilambar Pitambar University offers a BDS programme to students at the UG level for a duration of 5 years. The fees of BDS programme ranges somewhere around INR 11.5 lakh.

reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure, facilities, and placements are good.

review_content.Placements: Placement opportunities are good, we don't need to worry about that. Patients flow is much better than other BDS colleges of Jharkhand.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. There are well-maintained buildings, classrooms, grounds, and more. Labs are also good. Modern classrooms are also available. Hostels are also good, we don't need to worry about that. Food provided is good, and hygiene is a top priority here. Facilities are also good and helpful. The main thing is that patient flow is much better here, than in other BDS colleges in Jharkhand. Our college has modern equipment, so we can practice as much as we can at a higher level.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: College for better dental studies. You must visit this college and you will like it.

review_content.Placements: Specially, there are no placements like IT sectors but you are trained such that you can run your own clinic or get placed in hospitals. Every student gets internships from college for about 1.5 years of the internship period. You get enrolled in every department in BDS for practice. Also, you get internships and placements in local civil hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is quite good. We have well-maintained classes, buildings, and labs. There is no Wi-Fi in college and classrooms. But there are classrooms with digital boards. Labs are fair enough to get enough knowledge about all things. Obviously there is a proper well-maintained library with lots of books from many authors such that you can get to learn what you want. Librarians are very helpful and kind. Hostel is also quite good but mess needs some improvement. Canteen is also good. There are medical shops also so you can easily get your required medicine.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: College is really good for studies with a lot of practical experience .

review_content.Placements: BDS is the top course offered. Most students who have passed have opened their own clinics. Patients are available. There are a lot of patients in every single department, so we get a lot of practical hand experience, which is mainly required for our dentistry work.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is really great. It is more than 100 acres in size. The campus is full of trees, and even a small pond is available, with a guest house inside the campus too. The hostel is also okay. Three students share one room in the boys' hostel. Everyone has their own space because the rooms are T-shaped.

individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely dissatisfied with this college's management and faculty members.

content.Placements: There is no chance of any placement because nobody is interested in thinking for a while about placements. There is no placement cell. Nobody cares about the future of students, and even exams and sessions are very delayed. I have pursued BCA here for 3 years, but due to the delay of exams, it took 5 years to complete.
content.Infrastructure: There is a bad infrastructure for students. It is just an old building with zero facilities. There is no hostel facility. We will waste our time by taking admission here.
content.Faculty: It has very bad faculty members. There are no curriculum activities. Students taking admission will regret it forever because exams taken are very bad. Classes are not taken even in the 3-year course. Faculty members do support or guide us in any manner. Faculty and staff members are not supportive in any manner. They just told us to move to another office.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Sri Satguru Jagjit Singh Namdhari CollegeReviewed on 15 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with this college's management and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There is a bad infrastructure for students. It is just an old building with zero facilities. There is no hostel facility. We will waste our time by taking admission here.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Vananchal Dental College and HospitalReviewed on 11 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best part about this college is that it has a good number of patients which is good for dentistry.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and departments are good. We have to walk all day because most facilities are located upstairs. Labs are neat and clean. There is a library where we can read books until 4:30 PM and can borrow a minimum of two books for 7 days for studying.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Vananchal Dental College and HospitalReviewed on 11 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure, facilities, and placements are good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. There are well-maintained buildings, classrooms, grounds, and more. Labs are also good. Modern classrooms are also available. Hostels are also good, we don't need to worry about that. Food provided is good, and hygiene is a top priority here. Facilities are also good and helpful. The main thing is that patient flow is much better here, than in other BDS colleges in Jharkhand. Our college has modern equipment, so we can practice as much as we can at a higher level.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Vananchal Dental College and HospitalReviewed on 10 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College for better dental studies. You must visit this college and you will like it.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good. We have well-maintained classes, buildings, and labs. There is no Wi-Fi in college and classrooms. But there are classrooms with digital boards. Labs are fair enough to get enough knowledge about all things. Obviously there is a proper well-maintained library with lots of books from many authors such that you can get to learn what you want. Librarians are very helpful and kind. Hostel is also quite good but mess needs some improvement. Canteen is also good. There ar...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Vananchal Dental College and HospitalReviewed on 10 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is really good for studies with a lot of practical experience .
reviews.review_text: The campus is really great. It is more than 100 acres in size. The campus is full of trees, and even a small pond is available, with a guest house inside the campus too. The hostel is also okay. Three students share one room in the boys' hostel. Everyone has their own space because the rooms are T-shaped.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Ganesh Lal Agrawal CollegeReviewed on 25 Jun 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Honest review for M.Sc. Zoology at G.L.A. College, Medininagar.
reviews.review_text: There are four blocks of buildings in our college campus. Classrooms are spacious with blackboards and wooden benches for students. There is a library that is not in good condition. The canteen is located just beside the main gate, offering samosas and tea. There is a large playground for sports activities. The Boys College Hostel is located near the playground.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nilamber Pitambar University.
reviews.review_text: There are no labs; yes, classrooms are good. The library is also good, but there is no study. Wi-Fi is available but chargeable. The canteen is not available on campus. It's a very small campus with fewer facilities. There is no drinking water spot. Electricity fluctuates. Hostel facility is not available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Yodh Singh Namdhari Mahila CollegeReviewed on 10 Mar 2024)
reviews.review_heading: If you want to do graduation degree, Than this can be good option.
reviews.review_text: It's a normal college; this college is a very normal college. Wi-Fi facility is not available in this college; this college does not have mess and canteen facilities. It also does not have hostel facilities. If you want to do graduation in less money, then this can be a good option.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2019Offered by Janta Shivratri CollegeReviewed on 1 May 2023)
reviews.review_heading: If you are dedicated to your studies, then opt for this college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were quite good. It provides us books for our course in the libraries, and the classroom was quite good to study quietly there. It also provides us medical facilities and games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sant Tulsi Dash CollegeReviewed on 30 Apr 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for every UG student.
reviews.review_text: Classes are held regularly. The hostel and canteen facilities are not available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Ganesh Lal Agrawal CollegeReviewed on 9 Oct 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Ganesh Lal Agrawal College.
reviews.review_text: Our campus was Wi-Fi enabled. Our classrooms were well-maintained. The library was small. Classrooms were also not spacious. There was no canteen facility. Sports and medical facilities were not available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Janta Shivratri CollegeReviewed on 17 Aug 2022)
reviews.review_heading: It's a good college for any student who wants to complete his/her higher degree.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available in the college like labs, classrooms, as well as a library. In hostel, food in the mess is good. Medical facility are good and also, sometimes games are conducted. Sometimes, the college conducts district level games for all the students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2019Offered by Yodh Singh Namdhari Mahila CollegeReviewed on 9 Mar 2022)
reviews.review_heading: This college is good and well managed by fulfilling students' requirements.
reviews.review_text: This university has many sports facilities which include courts and a playground for games like cricket, basketball, volleyball, football, etc. Many other activities like tree plantation, free medical check-up camps, recreational activities, etc., were also organised. Students took part in all the activities and enjoyed it a lot.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Janta Shivratri CollegeReviewed on 25 Jan 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Janta Shivratri College.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities aren't accessible in our college. Our college should provide Wi-Fi. Clinical offices and sports are great, and yet other infrastructural facilities should be improved. The library is very far from the college. However, the college transportation facilities are available for assists to go there.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Ganesh Lal Agrawal CollegeReviewed on 27 Nov 2021)
reviews.review_heading: Faculty members of physics in the institution are very good.
reviews.review_text: I have not opted for a hostel because I stay in the same city with my parents. The hostel is available for SC and ST categories boys. The new hostels are also being constructed by the university. The food and lodging in the city are quite economical.

reviews_list.review_title: Best college with great faculty members, excellent infrastructure, and strong sports culture.

review_content.Placements: I am currently pursuing B.Tech in computer science from the 2023-2027 batch. Based on placement trends in recent years, around 85-90% of students from our course get placed. The highest package offered is approximately 45 LPA. The lowest salary is around 3.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Wipro, Infosys, and TCS.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college offers modern infrastructure for the computer science department, including high-speed Wi-Fi across the campus, well-equipped computer labs with updated systems, smart classrooms, and a beautiful library. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms, regular water supply, and Wi-Fi. The mess provides hygienic food with a balanced diet.

review_summary.college_name: Dr. Lankapalli Bullayya College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Dr. Lankapalli Bullayya College - A premier institution for holistic education in Visakhapatnam.

content.Placements: Bullayya College offered solid placement opportunities, especially in its engineering and PG streams, with well-known IT majors and occasional niche placements in biotech/research. The average packages typically over between 4.5 LPA to 7 LPA, with top performers seeing up to 12 LPA to 15 LPA+. To fully benefit, students should aim for strong academic records and active participation in training and placement activities.
content.Infrastructure: Bullayya College, officially known as PR Government College (autonomous) and affiliated with Andhra University in Visakhapatnam. It offered decent infrastructure and facilities for students across various streams. Campus facilities like Wi-Fi and internet. Sports play a major role at the college. So, many people achieve many things through sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good college but less placements. They are trying to get more opportunities for jobs.

content.Placements: 70% of the students got placed in our course. 6 LPA is the highest package offered in our course. TCS and LNT like great companies are provided for the placements. 60% of students got internships from the course. Roles offered are software engineer, web developer, and app developer. Placements will be good.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is provided as the students can get their own personal computers and can make projects. Labs are provided and are required for industry. Sports and games periods are provided 2 times a week.
content.Faculty: Teachers are skilled and knowledgeable. It provides excellent teaching. As the paper is from Andhra University, it is so tough. We don't get the exact questions we need to study the entire syllabus and cover the previous year's question papers and read from the referral textbook.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best college with great faculty members, excellent infrastructure, and strong sports culture.

content.Placements: I am currently pursuing B.Tech in computer science from the 2023-2027 batch. Based on placement trends in recent years, around 85-90% of students from our course get placed. The highest package offered is approximately 45 LPA. The lowest salary is around 3.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Wipro, Infosys, and TCS.
content.Infrastructure: Our college offers modern infrastructure for the computer science department, including high-speed Wi-Fi across the campus, well-equipped computer labs with updated systems, smart classrooms, and a beautiful library. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms, regular water supply, and Wi-Fi. The mess provides hygienic food with a balanced diet.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: If you are not getting AU, then it’s a better choice to come here as it is affiliated with it.

content.Placements: Mostly, people who have been placed through campus are in the telecom sector and in Mahindra Teach. Others are rumored to have been placed from outside colleges. Other companies like L&T, Wipro, and Cognizant have also taken some candidates but didn’t find suitable ones.
content.Infrastructure: For sports, you may have the facilities, but it’s overcrowded. But if you are interested in indoor sports, you will be provided with the GMVC (government) indoor stadium, which is 200 meters from the college, and you will be supported by the college faculty. Overall, sports are good if you pursue talent, but not for beginners.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good college with knowledge.

content.Placements: Almost 85 to 90 percent of students get placed in the campus placements; the highest package is 5 LPA and the lowest is 3 LPA. The top recruiters are Zithara, Micron, and L&T. The students also get an internship from the good companies. The roles are offered, like junior engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides good facilities for the students; it also has a canteen on the college premises. The food in the canteen was affordable and far better compared to other colleges that are near by. College also have Wi-Fi, libraries, digital classrooms, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and most lectures are completed by the M. Tech.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in the college are good. Wi-Fi is available in every class, and projectors make discussions easier for students. They offer library access, allowing students to borrow a number of books related to their courses. Although they do not provide hostels, there are hostels nearby for both girls and boys. Sports activities are also offered every week.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Classrooms are well-ventilated. Laboratory is better. We do not need to buy textbooks because all the books are available in our library. There are no hostels in this college. In the canteen, tiffin service is available. Sports are conducted in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Reviews of Dr. Lankapalli Bullayya College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Our college has Wi-Fi facilities all over campus, but connection is only available to the systems in our lab. Hostel food is good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure and interactive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college premises is very calm. There is no hostel and the classrooms and library are very good. The infrastructure of our college is very good and extra-curricular activities and canteen and medical facilities are available at our college. We are very happy to study. The canteen food is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: You can learn many things from this college. The faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available. In this engineering college, there is a big library with good facilities, and Wi-Fi is also available. All the classrooms are very neat. The campus also has a canteen and stationery shops. So, there is no problem with books and food. Our college is very famous for sports and cultural activities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. Lankapalli Bullayya College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great. The classrooms are spacious. We have three canteens. A first-aid room is available. Our college has a basketball court, a large football court, a badminton court, more than five computer labs and also other labs for many other departments.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, environment, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The labs of the college are excellent, with developed equipment and fast computer services. The library is very big, and there is no remark about not getting the wanted book to read. It is very peaceful to read there. There is no hostel at the college. Sports and games play a top role and top preference in the college. The canteen is very spacious to sit and discuss and eat something.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members and better environment.
reviews.review_text: There are labs, laboratory and library were comfortable, and we can have peace of mind. There is no hostel facility but we can join in private rooms that are close to the college. So we can have more comfort because the college is surrounded with good communities.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the quality of study and infrastructure. The main focus here is placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good enough here. Classrooms are neat, and labs were available with working equipment. The library space was enough, and almost all relevant books are available. There was not any hostel, but the food served in the canteen was good and tasty. Medical facilities are always available.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good with good placements and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good in our course. There are labs, classrooms, and a library in our course. They give the Wi-Fi password. The quality of the facilities in the hostel is good. The quality of the food is also good. The mess is also neat and clean. The canteen and medical facilities are good. We can play games.

faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of Jawahar Engineering College.

content.Placements: Our seniors are working in well-known companies. There are no campus interviews. However, they will refer some companies for students who are seeking jobs, and it depends on their knowledge to get placed. However, teaching in this college is good. Our seniors got placed in companies like TCS, Wipro, and other reputed companies.
content.Infrastructure: The college doesn't have a very good infrastructure, as it has an incomplete building. But safety management is good. Classrooms are not that good as compared with other colleges. However, the fee structure of the college is affordable, and if you are unable to pay, they will give more time for you to pay.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college is located in the city. It has good facilities.

content.Placements: Around 60% of the students got placed from our college. Students also got placed in core companies. Salary packages offered are high. Companies like ITC, Cadbury, ONGC, Infosys, Cisco system, Accenture, Barclays, Bharat Electronics, etc., visited the campus to offer placements. On average, every student will spend one year on internship.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities like labs, classrooms, library, medical facilities and sports and games are available on the campus. Quality of labs is almost good. The faculty members teach very well by conducting practical sessions. Classrooms are very good, and the blackboards are also very good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Very good college with good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Very nice. Cognizant, Surya Tech solutions, HGS, Vertex, Infosys, IBM, In our college we have individual branch association leading with their branch HOD. Students will be selected as President, Vice president, treasurer, secretary, joint secretary and some Coordinators. Technical Fests and Workshops are conducted by students under the guidance of respective HOD.
review_content.Infrastructure: High-speed Wi-Fi, good classroom well furnished, library with around 23000 volumes, Good food will nice canteen, big seminar hall with around 500 seating capacity and function hall with 1500 seating,. Peaceful climate with trees and grass around. Love this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good in infrastructure, but bad in rules.

review_content.Placements: The placements were not that much good for us even for the senior batches. Approximately 20% were got selected. They offered nearly 6 lakh per annum. Globussoft, Infosys, HCL are major companies that visited our college. There is a good placement cell.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was awesome. Ther are proper lab facilities for all type of courses. The library is available for the students. There is no sports and games for the students. The canteen was good.
review_content.Faculty: The faculty were very good in giving the information to the students. When comes to teaching quality, some are not at all professionals and giving classes. Few were very at the technical side. We didn't get even single industry exposure from the college. It was very bad for us.

review_summary.college_name: Yogananda Institute of Technology and Science Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Everything is good, but there is no proper management and permanent faculty members.

content.Placements: Placements are not provided since I started studying in college. The placement cell was superb, but there was no placement officer. CRT classes are also not provided for final year students. At least they are not giving information about off-campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and the library are provided with high quality, but due to less usage and no proper maintenance, equipment is not in use. Food is the best and provided with high quality and better quantity, and students are satisfied with food. Timings of the library were not followed, and there are no updated journals.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of teachers, good placements provided in 2015 and really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: About 67% of the students from our stream were placed. The lowest salary package offered here was 2 LPA and the highest salary package offered was 6 LPA. The top recruiting company for our course is Navayuga Constructions Pvt Ltd, and the top role offered in our course is a junior structural engineer. We got 8 more companies, which were led by my placement authority. Two companies out of them were not our core companies. However, we tried those interviews to gain some knowledge about interviews and to get rid of the fear of interviews.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Very good college with good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Very nice. Cognizant, Surya Tech solutions, HGS, Vertex, Infosys, IBM, In our college we have individual branch association leading with their branch HOD. Students will be selected as President, Vice president, treasurer, secretary, joint secretary and some Coordinators. Technical Fests and Workshops are conducted by students under the guidance of respective HOD.
content.Infrastructure: High-speed Wi-Fi, good classroom well furnished, library with around 23000 volumes, Good food will nice canteen, big seminar hall with around 500 seating capacity and function hall with 1500 seating,. Peaceful climate with trees and grass around. Love this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: The college is good in infrastructure, but bad in rules.

content.Placements: The placements were not that much good for us even for the senior batches. Approximately 20% were got selected. They offered nearly 6 lakh per annum. Globussoft, Infosys, HCL are major companies that visited our college. There is a good placement cell.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was awesome. Ther are proper lab facilities for all type of courses. The library is available for the students. There is no sports and games for the students. The canteen was good.
content.Faculty: The faculty were very good in giving the information to the students. When comes to teaching quality, some are not at all professionals and giving classes. Few were very at the technical side. We didn't get even single industry exposure from the college. It was very bad for us.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because of rules.

content.Placements: For our batch, we got 1 or 2 companies came for the placement that those 2 are consultancies. Fee got selected, and they didn't get any offer letters after selecting the guys from the college. Now they don't even have the placement officer properly. It was the worst for students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good, but there are strict rules for the students. It should not be like that for students. Apart from that rest is okay. The canteen needs to develop. Remaining maintenance was good in the college, and there is a good environment in the college, and we also got a prize for the infrastructure.

admission_overview.college_name: Yogananda Institute of Technology and Science Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: Yogananda Institute of Technology and Science Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Yogananda Institute of Technology and Science admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingEngineering and Business and Management Studies.Yogananda Institute of Technology and Scienceadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asGATE, AP EAMCET, and AP PGECET. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 54,000 - 2,04,000for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses is 4 years.

reviews.review_text: There are well and certified laboratories in our college in our entire region. Boys and girls have separate hostel facilities, and even free Wi-Fi facility was available from 2 years to 4 years batches. The food served here was hygiene, and our management was also great.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: High-speed Wi-Fi, good classroom well furnished, library with around 23000 volumes, Good food will nice canteen, big seminar hall with around 500 seating capacity and function hall with 1500 seating,. Peaceful climate with trees and grass around. Love this college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good in infrastructure, but bad in rules.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was awesome. Ther are proper lab facilities for all type of courses. The library is available for the students. There is no sports and games for the students. The canteen was good.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good, but there are strict rules for the students. It should not be like that for students. Apart from that rest is okay. The canteen needs to develop. Remaining maintenance was good in the college, and there is a good environment in the college, and we also got a prize for the infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Yogananda Institute of Technology and Science has a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has square feet about eight acres where it has a huge infrastructure and a very well labs. There are also facilities like e-classroom and a sports ground, volleyball place, kabaddi, and other indoor games such as carrom, table tennis. We have an e-library with 25 systems where we can use the internet.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. Not too good nor too bad. We have got every laboratory equipped with efficient machines and tools for our course experiment. We also have got a big ground, but the cafeteria here is not good. The classes here are nice. Overall, the campus here is average.

reviews.review_heading: The placements and the facilities are neither good nor bad.
reviews.review_text: In my college, the free Wi-Fi facility is available. The labs are well-furniture, and the classrooms are well-ventilated. There are more games and sports to encourage the students. The library which has more books related to the subjects and the others also. In the canteen, the food was a little bit less quality and not up to the mark. The hostel rooms are good to stay.

reviews.review_heading: Good environment and faculty members
reviews.review_text:
The laboratories are very good and have all the equipment. The classrooms and the library are very good.
The college has enough space to play games. The canteen is very good. The hostel rooms are free and have a good maintenance.
The food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Better not to prefer because of very rare placement. Good infrastructure. Improper management.
reviews.review_text: There are good classrooms, excellent library, open area for sports, better security for girls, etc. The canteen is not very good. The labs and classrooms are well-equipped with the latest technologies. Food available in the canteen is not very good. Washrooms in the college are too bad with foul smell and improper maintenance.

reviews.review_heading: Think twice before joining. Fully dissatisfied because of the poor placements.
reviews.review_text: This college has excellent infrastructure. It has been awarded twice for the best infrastructure college in Andhra Pradesh. Vast campus with excellent laboratories. Average classrooms and average medical facilities. Sports and games are only in the papers, there is no physical trainer even. The quality of hostel is average. The quality of food in the canteen is just satisfactory. The college library is well maintained and it is spacious with a good collection.

reviews.review_heading: Fully dissatisfied with the administration and placements.
reviews.review_text: While talking about the infrastructure, this college has an excellent infrastructure even it has been awarded twice for the best infrastructure in Andhra Pradesh. It had a vast campus with excellent laboratories, average classrooms and low medication facility. Sports and games facilities were not up to the mark as it didn’t have a physical trainer. The quality of hostel was average and the quality of food in the canteen was just satisfactory. In my tenure in college, I did not face any huge prob...

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: Nishitha College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: The placement for senior was not good but for my batch placement improved. Many of the students were placed in different companies. Karvy, Mahindra, HGS, Axeness Technology etc. visited college in order to place students. The minimum salary offered is 2.5 LPA and the maximum is 4.5.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of college is awesome. It is equipped with a beautiful lawn and pool. The Wi-Fi is not available in the campus for public use. The labs are equipped with computers connected via LAN. The classrooms and library is also in good condition. The quality of the food in canteen is average but limited dishes are only available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: My college is best and I am proud to be a part of it.

content.Placements: Many companies visit the college. Lots of off-campus drives are also conducted. Students get many benefits. Nice companies approach for the students. Almost 50% of the students were selected last year, and this is still counting. Many companies also will come to the college, and many have already visited. Many numbers of students also got selected. Specifically, computers science branch students are selected.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is enabled on campus, with all the well-furnished, equipped labs and instruments. Experienced faculty members are there for the guidance of the of the students, and all-round development is available. Sports and leisure activities are included with guide and fare game with brotherhood feeling.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely better college, not bad.

content.Placements: The placements were provided on my campus. The college is near to hardware park, so the companies like HGC, HCL, Axness, etc., come to the college from the hardware park. Not too many placements are available, only two or three companies visit the college yearly.
content.Infrastructure: There was no Wi-Fi on the campus. The labs are much better. The library was not a big one, but it was enough for my college students, the new edition books are not available. The medical facilities, sports and games are available, but not too many. The sports are conducted once in a year.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Good environment on the campus and good faculty.

content.Placements: The placements in the college are average. 12% placement is recorded in the college. The companies like HCL, Micromax, and Dell are the most visiting companies in the college. The college management concentrates on every student, and they used to call parents if any issue is done by the student.
content.Infrastructure: The labs and canteen in the college are very good. There is a good library with many books. Very good lab facilities are available and have all equipment in the lab. Twice a year, we have a sports day, and it is held at least for a week. We have a playground except for basketball pitch. Every week, on Saturday, we have a free day to play games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: The review of Nishitha College of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: The placements started from my seniors batch, in that placements, some of my seniors got selected to work in the foreign, which is Malesia. Around, ten members got selected in that campus placement, and after that, due to some issues with the college permission in Telangana, there are no placements done for my batch, but for my juniors, there are a lot of placements from the top MNCs.
content.Infrastructure: We have the Wi-Fi facility in the college, and we have the superb lab facility to do the experiments in the college and no need to go to the other college for the lab experiments as we have all the tools available to experiment. We love our college ground, and most of the time we were on the ground only. We have the beautiful library for studies and all the semester books are available in it. We have the medical facility.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It's a very nice college to study and improve your knowledge.

content.Placements: In my college, we are having wonderful placement opportunities. The average salary per annum offered is 3.5 Lacs. The college is good for improving, you can focus on self-study a lot here. Placements wise, it's a very nice college.
content.Infrastructure: In my college, we are having wonderful and so many opportunities to create and set our career goal. We are having the best hostel facilities and labs. Classrooms are a platform to learn new things in my career, they were very nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college in all aspects.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students are placed. The lowest salary package offered is 1.5 LPA. The highest salary package offered is 9 LPA. The minimum salary package offered ranges from 1.5 LPA to 4.5 LPA. Capgemini, TCS, Infosys, Verzeo, Skill Vertex, Microsoft, and IBM are the top recruiting companies. The roles offered are general manager, assistant manager, software engineer, director, and designer.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, the laboratory is available. This college provides a girls' hostel, and it is very helpful to long-distance girls. The quality of food is very good. Medical facilities are also provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college environment is awesome, peaceful air and good infrastructure is available.

content.Placements: Above 70% of students will get placements at our college. Infosys, Tech Mahindra, TCS, Wipro, and a lot of local companies visit our college for placements. This college provides you with the course you need. All lectures will help you to get the course you wanted. We can also have internships with reputed companies and get certificates too.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has air-conditioned labs and neat classrooms. We got an all-rounder library where we read books daily. We have a hostel with full security for women. Quality food is available in our college. One can also enjoy the canteen food. You can play in the water if you like to play. We have a dance club, sports club, and music club.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good placements and infrastructure, but it has poor hostel infrastructure.

content.Placements: Above 80% of the students got placed from our college. Top recruiting companies are IBM and Savantis. Roles offered are associate system engineer and system analyst. The highest salary package offered is 7 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3.4 LPA. About 50% of the members completed internships and they are highly recommendable.
content.Infrastructure: It has a good infrastructure and I loved it. They serve very delicious food. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are held in our college the most. We have a good and simple library. There is a good atmosphere on campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a good environment, and it is pollution-free, and the faculty are also very helpful.

content.Placements: No other courses were offered in our college. Almost 80% of the students are from the CSE branch in our college. The salary packages offered in our course are low because we are freshers. Different types of roles are offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are good. The quality of the food available in the mess, canteen, etc., are also good. Sports and games are conducted every week. A medical facility is also available. Many more events are also conducted in college itself only.

admission_overview.college_name: Sri Mittapalli Institute of Technology for Women (SMITW) Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: Sri Mittapalli Institute of Technology for Women (SMITW) Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sri Mittapalli Institute of Technology for Women (SMITW) admission process is both merit and entrance-based, depending on the course. It offers courses at the UG and PG levels. Candidates who are selected for admission must pay the course fee to secure their seat.
The application process is conducted online. Candidates must contact the admission office for more details.

courses_data.name: Sri Mittapalli Institute of Technology for Women (SMITW) B.E. / B.Tech Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:AP EAMCET, JEE Main, CBSE 12th, BIEAP
courses_data.description: Sri Mittapalli Institute of Technology for Women (SMITW)offersB.E. / B.Techfor 4 years. The course is a UG level programme that is offered in full time mode. Applicants must have a sufficient score in one among JEE Main, AP EAMCET, CBSE 12th, and BIEAP or equivalent exams. Check the eligibility criteria below before applying to Sri Mittapalli Institute of Technology for Women (SMITW)'s B.E. / B.Tech course: Eligibility Criteria

courses_data.name: Sri Mittapalli Institute of Technology for Women (SMITW) MBA/PGDM Admission 2025
courses_data.description: TheMBA/PGDMatSri Mittapalli Institute of Technology for Women (SMITW)is a 2 years programme offered to the students in the field of Business & Management Studies. Admission to this course is offered based on a valid score in APICET. To complete the Sri Mittapalli Institute of Technology for Women (SMITW) admission process for the 2025 batch, selected candidates must pay the applicable course fee ofINR 54,000.

courses_data.name: Sri Mittapalli Institute of Technology for Women (SMITW) M.E./M.Tech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Sri Mittapalli Institute of Technology for Women (SMITW)offers 2 yearsM.E./M.Techin Computer Science Engineering programme. Admission to the course is based on a valid score in AP PGECET. The institute offers admission in 18 seats of M.E./M.Tech.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Sri Mittapalli Institute of Technology for Women (SMITW)?
faqs.answer: Courses offerred by Sri Mittapalli Institute of Technology for Women (SMITW) are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Sri Mittapalli Institute of Technology for Women (SMITW) goes up to 348.

reviews.review_heading: It's a very nice college to study and improve your knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: Our college environment is awesome, peaceful air and good infrastructure is available.
reviews.review_text: Our college has air-conditioned labs and neat classrooms. We got an all-rounder library where we read books daily. We have a hostel with full security for women. Quality food is available in our college. One can also enjoy the canteen food. You can play in the water if you like to play. We have a dance club, sports club, and music club.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good placements and infrastructure, but it has poor hostel infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: It has a good infrastructure and I loved it. They serve very delicious food. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are held in our college the most. We have a good and simple library. There is a good atmosphere on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good environment, and it is pollution-free, and the faculty are also very helpful.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good. The quality of the food available in the mess, canteen, etc., are also good. Sports and games are conducted every week. A medical facility is also available. Many more events are also conducted in college itself only.

reviews.review_heading: I think choosing our college is the best. Faculty help and train the students in many ways.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided here are a digital library, good labs, and good classrooms. The college has the best infrastructure. There are many facilities in the hostel. A good canteen facility and nice medical facilities are available here. There is good ground for sports for both boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college for meritorious students.
reviews.review_text: Labs are available to gain knowledge. In our department labs, a few equipment and components are available. Good faculty are worth than equipment. Wi-Fi facility is not available on the campus. Classrooms and library are good. The library has less volumes of books. The standard of the hostel is low. I will rate it 1 out of 5.

reviews.review_heading: Worth to study in Sri Mittapalli College.
reviews.review_text: In Mittapalli College, the infrastructure is good and better than other colleges. The college maintains good infrastructure like tables, and the labs are also very good. The food in the college canteen is good. The hostel is available for girls.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with my college, I got good placement from my college.
reviews.review_text: The labs are good, and Wi-Fi enabled. The library has all books. The medical facilities are available, stationary is good. There are sports club, dance club, communication skills club and music club available in our college. The hostel facility is also available in our college. The canteen facility is available through out the day.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a good environment and is very nice.
reviews.review_text: The college has nice and good environment. The labs are good, the library and ground were too good. There is no Wi-Fi in the college. The games are in our college are kabaddi, Kho and volleyball. The classrooms are a little bit smaller.

reviews.review_heading: I'm not dissatisfied but need to improve.
reviews.review_text: College has good infrastructure and other facilities like classrooms and labs. Labs have good functioning computers and air-conditioners which help us study well in the presence of encouraging faculty members. Finally, infrastructure is good with all facilities.
